title: Secret Violation v1
description: Structured error emitted when ingress-policy detects secrets, PII, env-values, or high-entropy candidates. Agents parse this to rephrase their input. Never contains the detected secret or a hash of it — only pattern names and offset ranges.

policy.description: Policy that was in effect when the violation was detected. reject = caller must rephrase and retry; redact = value was redacted in place, caller may continue.

pattern.description: Canonical pattern name (e.g. github_token, aws_access_key, jwt, email). Never the regex body.

field.description: Input field that triggered the detection (e.g. title, summary, details, embeddingText, content). Omitted for free-string calls.

offsetRanges.description: Byte offsets into the original input field. The secret content itself is intentionally not included.

suggestion.description: Human- and agent-readable guidance for how to proceed (e.g. replace with ${GITHUB_TOKEN} reference).
